ref: The people of all nations will be brought before him, and he will separate them, as shepherds separate their sheep from their goats.
text: T…õ…õle kei balaŇč pou baa kaa yilaa me gyaŇč, na maa kpase be man akpeŇč ala Ňčgba mena keŇč wonembia k…õ…õlere ne kpase asoose lee namense man n…õ.
translated: They said that the man who was going to the farm should not go, because the fetish priest said that the spirits of the land were angry and would not allow anyone to go to the farm that day.

ref: Now hurry! Tell his disciples he has been raised to life and is on his way to Galilee. Go there, and you will see him. This is what I came to tell you.‚ÄĚ
text: na …õ ke ta bileŇčbileŇč ke yako …Ē kaseela baŇč nyiaa ‚Äė∆Ü te fom lee woya man te …Ē te kyaŇč Ňčon gb…õ…õ …Ē ne gyu Galelia t…õ…õle man. Bot…Ē…Ē te …õ kena e. Kei y…õna nombii keŇč me dana maa yako Ňčon.‚Äô ‚ÄĚ
translated: and he said to the disciples, "The Son of Man is going to be delivered into the hands of men. They will kill him, and after three days he will rise." But they did not understand what he meant and were afraid to ask him about it.

ref: When Herod found out that the wise men from the east had tricked him, he was very angry. He gave orders for his men to kill all the boys who lived in or near Bethlehem and were two years old and younger. This was based on what he had learned from the wise men.
text: Gyoo Herode kena nyi Siakaralatena baŇč ta mo adao di …Ē d…Ē…Ē, keŇč be ta bese k…ĒŇč kaa mo …Ē gyaŇč bela ya n…õ …Ē gyeŇča baŇč nideli. KeŇčte …Ē kpila …Ē yoon…Ē…Ētena nyi baa gyu B…õtel…õh…õm don…Ē…Ē man, na ke don…Ē…Ēsebia Ňčan benaa na ke n…õ, na baa koe bia baala baŇč pou be ta bee ta kela kulutooneŇč ala ya n…õ, nawolo nyi mena debaŇč kenaŇč man te Siakaralatena baŇč yako e nyi be naa kyolobii Ňčon.
translated: The angel of the Lord appeared to the shepherds in the field at night and said, the Savior is born in the city of David, and you will find a baby wrapped in cloth and lying in a manger. Then they quickly went to Bethlehem to see, and when they saw it was as they were told, and they told everyone what they had seen and heard about the child, and all who heard were amazed at what the shepherds told them about the Savior who was born.

ref: As bad as you are, you still know how to give good gifts to your children. But your heavenly Father is even more ready to give good things to people who ask.
text: Akpaa …õm…õ…õ baŇč …õ y…õ…õ nombiakum…õ…õy…õ…õraw…Ē koraŇč gyeŇč ab…Ē…Ē kpaakpaa ka mo fa …õ bia na, de yaa sena te …õ kya Ňčon …Ē kyaa adido n…õ be gyae waa mo ab…Ē…Ē kpaakpaa Ňčan kela k…õŇča n…õ fa baŇč b…õ…õ sola e n…õ ya.
translated: The elders have given the young men permission to go to the forest and cut sticks to build the shed for the celebration, but they should be careful not to cut the sticks from the sacred forest, and they should also bring the sticks to the town square for the elders to inspect before using them for the shed.

ref: So God's promise came true, just as the prophet Isaiah had said, ‚ÄúThese people will listen and listen, but never understand. They will look and look, but never see.
